section.heading: Local governance

subsection.heading: Rule of construction
subsection.chapeau: Nothing in this chapter shall be construed to allow the Secretary to—

paragraph.content: exercise any governance or authority over school administration, including the development and expenditure of school budgets, unless otherwise authorized under this chapter;
issue any regulation without first complying with the rulemaking requirements of section 553 of title 5; or
issue any nonregulatory guidance without first, to the extent feasible, considering input from stakeholders.

content.p: Nothing in subsection (a) shall be construed to affect any authority the Secretary has under any other Federal law.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 89–10, title VIII, § 8541, as added Pub. L. 114–95, title VIII, § 8033, Dec. 10, 2015, 129 Stat. 2118.)

note.heading: Effective Date
note.p: Section effective Dec. 10, 2015, except with respect to certain noncompetitive programs and competitive programs, see section 5 of Pub. L. 114–95, set out as an Effective Date of 2015 Amendment note under section 6301 of this title.
